title: Petty cash management alternatives Kenya — a six-week migration playbook
excerpt: A six-week migration playbook for retiring petty cash in Kenyan SMEs — M-Pesa float accounts, prepaid corporate cards, virtual cards for online spend, banked supplier accounts, plus change-management traps.
meta_title: Petty cash alternatives Kenya — 6-week migration for SMEs
meta_description: Retire petty cash in 6 weeks: M-Pesa float, prepaid cards, virtual cards, banked suppliers. Decision tree, rollout, change-management traps for Kenyan SMEs.
